# daytona_sandbox_trace_spans (Data Source)

Reads OpenTelemetry spans for a Daytona sandbox trace.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_trace_spans" "example" {
  sandbox_id = "sandbox-id"
  trace_id   = "trace-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sandbox_id` (String) Daytona sandbox ID.
- `trace_id` (String) Trace ID.

### Optional

- `request_organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Returned trace spans. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `duration_ns` (Number) Span duration in nanoseconds.
- `parent_span_id` (String) Parent span ID, when available.
- `span_attributes` (Map of String, Sensitive) Span attributes.
- `span_id` (String) Span ID.
- `span_name` (String) Span name.
- `status_code` (String) Span status code, when available.
- `status_message` (String) Span status message, when available.
- `timestamp` (String) Span timestamp.
- `trace_id` (String) Trace ID.
